_comment: Power Automate Flow: Scrap / E-Waste Disposal Notification
_import_instructions: 1. Create a new Automated flow → 'When an HTTP request is received'
2. Paste the JSON schema into 'Request Body JSON Schema'
3. Copy the generated URL into the SPFx property pane under 'Scrap / E-Waste Disposal'

trigger.type: When an HTTP request is received

actions.subject: ♻️ E-Waste Disposal: @{triggerBody()?['assetId']} — @{triggerBody()?['event']}
actions.body:
IT Asset Disposal Record

An asset has been marked for @{triggerBody()?['event']}.

Asset ID@{triggerBody()?['assetId']}
Type@{triggerBody()?['assetType']}
Model@{triggerBody()?['model']}
Vendor@{triggerBody()?['vendor']}
Serial No.@{triggerBody()?['serialNumber']}
Purchase Date@{triggerBody()?['purchaseDate']}
Original Cost₹@{triggerBody()?['cost']}
Department@{triggerBody()?['department']}
Disposed By@{triggerBody()?['disposedBy']}
Disposal Date@{triggerBody()?['timestamp']}

Please ensure proper e-waste disposal documentation is completed per WEEE/local regulations. Vendor certificate of destruction must be filed within 30 days.

actions._comment: Optional: log to a dedicated E-Waste register list in SharePoint
